title: Subitem reporting
excerpt:
Anyone have issues with subitems and reporting? Seems we are getting different numbers about 4 or 5 different ways. Nothing ever consistent. Need to export to Excel and just a hassle. 
Trying to track billable hours. Tha…

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone have issues with subitems and reporting? Seems we are getting different numbers about 4 or 5 different ways. Nothing ever consistent. Need to export to Excel and just a hassle.

Trying to track billable hours. Thanks.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mw01

Are you using any 3rd party app to track the time & billable/non-billable hours alongside monday.com? I wonder if it’s worth connecting and I can share screens and show you a couple of ways we approach that same predicament.

Let me know if you wanted to sit together and see

peta@upstreamtech.io
+61 3 9067 5611
upstream

Happy to accommodate any time difference!

posts.author: Michele_Decadis (Michele Toscani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey MW @mw01

there is a nice new app out there that does exactly what you are looking for. It’s called sumUp for monday and has two really powerful dashboard gadgets and reports:

  • Group By Widget: a one-dimensional widget, perfect for streamlined metrics grouping
  • Two Dimensional Widget: offers a comprehensive overview of complex data relationships.

Might be worth keeping an eye on. I think it will definitely help you with your first problem mentioned here. And best of all, it’s totally free.

Hope it helps!

Cheers,
Michele
